title: deployment-risk-scorer inputs
description: Typed inputs for the deployment-risk-scorer runtime agent. Machine-readable mirror of the Inputs table in AGENT.md. The harness validates caller-supplied input packets against this schema before the agent begins work; validation failures surface the offending field to the caller rather than failing mid-run.

change_path.description: Example from AGENT.md: `force-app/main/default/` or path to a `package.xml`

target_org_alias.description: Example from AGENT.md: `uat`, `prod` (must be sf-CLI authenticated)

change_scope.description: Example from AGENT.md: `full`, `delta` (since last successful deploy), or a commit range
